stepBody:
Jake creates a new Semester column that contains the semester mentioned in the Team Description column. He writes the following skeleton code:

$$basketball['Semester']=basketball['Team$$ Description'].str.extract(iv)

Verify if the following regex pattern correctly fills the blank (iv) to create the Semester column? For example, your chosen regex pattern should extract the text "Fall 2025" from the example below: "D(100) Hoopers played during the Fall $$2025$$ semester on Monday."

Assumptions: No team name contains the words Spring or Fall. IM basketball does not happen during the summer semester. All entries in the Team Description column follow this format: {Team Name} played during the {Fall or Spring} {Year} semester on {Day}.

Pattern: r"([FallSpring] \d+)"
